allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'if \(Test-Path '\\''E:/my-projects/Researchforge/.claude/settings.json'\\''\) { \(Get-Content '\\''E:/my-projects/Researchforge/.claude/settings.json'\\'' -Raw\) -match '\\''"model"'\\'' | Out-Null; Get-Content '\\''E:/my-projects/Researchforge/.claude/settings.json'\\'' | Select-String -Pattern '\\''model'\\'' }; Write-Output '\\''--- user ~/.claude/settings.json ---'\\''; if \(Test-Path $env:USERPROFILE'\\''/.claude/settings.json'\\''\) { Get-Content \($env:USERPROFILE + '\\''/.claude/settings.json'\\''\) } else { Write-Output '\\''\(no user settings.json\)'\\'' }; Write-Output '\\''--- local settings ---'\\''; if \(Test-Path '\\''E:/my-projects/Researchforge/.claude/settings.local.json'\\''\) { Get-Content '\\''E:/my-projects/Researchforge/.claude/settings.local.json'\\'' } else { Write-Output '\\''\(no settings.local.json\)'\\'' }')

Bash(cd "E:/my-projects/Researchforge" && grep -E "[0-9]+ passed|failed" /tmp/full.log | tail -1; git add -A && git commit -q -F .git/COMMIT_EDITMSG_RF && rm -f .git/COMMIT_EDITMSG_RF && echo COMMITTED; echo "unpushed: $\(git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline | wc -l\)")
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 py -3 -m researchforge.cli run data/demo_dml.csv double_ml --config '{"treatment":"treat","outcome":"y"}')
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 py -3 -m researchforge.cli run data/_tmp_dmlstr.csv double_ml --config '{"treatment":"grp","outcome":"y"}')
